mechanism_narrative: A persistently low FEDFUNDS rate anchors short-term rates and, when paired with falling CPIAUCSL, reduces expected inflation and policy tightening pressure. That combination pushes the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days as bond investors price a deeper easing path.
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS declines or stays flat while CPIAUCSL decelerates, yet the 10-year yield rises in a majority of 20-day windows; also reject if the sign relationship between these inputs and yield direction is not negative in rolling 3-year tests.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises above its recent trend and PAYEMS stalls, markets infer weakening labor demand and lower medium-term growth, which compresses the term premium. This should pull the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3pp over 3 months and PAYEMS growth is non-positive
failure_condition: Reject if the trigger fires but the 10-year yield rises in more than 60% of triggered 20-day windows, or if the effect disappears once PAYEMS is included as a control.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized drop in RSAFS and HOUST signals broad demand destruction and weaker private-sector activity. That shift lowers expected real growth and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS and HOUST decline together but the 5-day yield reaction is not negative in at least 55% of cases, or if either series alone explains the effect without interaction terms.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp fall in INDPRO while CPIAUCSL remains elevated indicates output contraction without immediate disinflation, a stagflationary mix that keeps policy restrictive and lifts Treasury term premia. The 10-year yield should rise over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls > 1.0% over 2 months while CPIAUCSL is flat or rising
failure_condition: Reject if the staggered combination of falling INDPRO and sticky CPIAUCSL does not precede a positive 20-day yield response, or if the effect reverses when CPIAUCSL is subdued.

mechanism_narrative: A cut in FEDFUNDS from an already restrictive level signals imminent policy easing and lower expected short rates. Over the next 60 trading days, that should move the 10-year Treasury yield downward as the market prices a lower future rate path.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS declines by at least 50 bps within 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if policy-cut episodes are followed by positive 60-day yield changes in most cases, or if the predictive sign flips once the starting FEDFUNDS level is above 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS after a prior slump indicates demand stabilization and improves growth expectations. That should lift the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days as investors price less recession risk and a smaller flight-to-quality bid.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises for 2 consecutive monthly prints after a prior 3-month decline
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS rebounds but the 10-year yield still falls in a majority of 20-day windows, or if the signal vanishes after controlling for UNRATE and PAYEMS.

mechanism_narrative: In a recessionary labor regime, a simultaneous rise in UNRATE and drop in PAYEMS confirms labor-market deterioration strong enough to overwhelm inflation concerns. That confirmation should pull the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises and PAYEMS falls in the same monthly release
failure_condition: Reject if same-month UNRATE/PAYEMS deterioration does not produce a negative 5-day yield response, or if the effect is present when only one of the two series moves.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO falls while HOUST also contracts, real-economy slack is broad rather than sector-specific, and bond investors demand less inflation compensation. In that regime the 10-year Treasury yield should fall over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if concurrent declines in INDPRO and HOUST fail to predict lower 60-day yields, or if the interaction term is insignificant after either series is included separately.
